beIN SPORTS 7.desc_ar: An ATP 250 clay-court tournament held in Bucharest, Romania, played on outdoor red clay. Part of the European clay swing leading into Roland Garros, it features a 28-player singles draw and 16-team doubles. The event rewards strong baseline play, endurance, and tactical construction, with valuable ATP ranking points and a title at stake.

beIN SPORTS 2.desc_ar: Angers have lost 33 of their 64 Ligue 1 matches against Lyon, more than against any other opponent in their top-flight history. Angers have conceded 120 goals against Lyon in the competition, at least 14 more than against any other team. Angers have lost 11 of their last 12 Ligue 1 matches against Lyon, the exception being a 3-0 home win in August 2021. Over the last eight seasons, only Paris SG  and Lille  have won more games against the same opponent in Ligue 1.
